data.title: classify-task.sh: invalid status 'ready' in task filter at line 64
data.description:
## Incident Overview
classify-task.sh line 64 includes 'ready' in the status tuple: `t.get('status') in ('open', 'in_progress', 'ready')`. 'ready' is not a valid status in either the v2 or v3 ticket system. Valid statuses are: open, in_progress, closed, error, fsck_needed. This is a v2 artifact that may indicate the filter was written expecting a status transition state that was never implemented or has since been renamed.

## Impact
Tasks will never match the 'ready' condition (no tickets have that status), so the filter is functionally equivalent to checking ('open', 'in_progress') — but it indicates the file may have other v2 assumptions and should be audited.

## Affected File
plugins/dso/scripts/classify-task.sh line 64

## Fix
Remove 'ready' from the status tuple: change `in ('open', 'in_progress', 'ready')` to `in ('open', 'in_progress')`.
